description: Sets a named global integer variable to a specific value.

parameters.name: Tag
parameters.description: Name of the global variable to set.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: New integer value.

description: Starts a quest by name, making it appear in the journal.

parameters.name: Quest Name
parameters.description: Internal name of the quest to start.

description: Advances a quest to its next step.

parameters.name: Quest Name
parameters.description: Internal name of the quest to advance.

description: Completes a quest with the given end-state ID.

parameters.name: Quest Name
parameters.description: Internal name of the quest.

parameters.name: End State ID
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the end state to trigger.

description: Fails a quest with the given fail-state ID.

parameters.name: Quest Name
parameters.description: Internal name of the quest.

parameters.name: Fail State ID
parameters.description: Numeric ID of the fail state to trigger.

description: Awards XP to all party members.

parameters.name: XP
parameters.description: Amount of experience points to award.

description: Awards XP to the player character only.

parameters.name: XP
parameters.description: Amount of experience points to award to the player.

description: Gives the player a number of items by internal name.

parameters.name: Item Name
parameters.description: Internal prefab name of the item.

parameters.name: Count
parameters.description: Number of items to give.

description: Removes one instance of an item from the player's inventory.

parameters.name: Item Name
parameters.description: Internal prefab name of the item to remove.

description: Removes a specific number of items from the player's inventory.

parameters.name: Item Name
parameters.description: Internal prefab name of the item to remove.

parameters.name: Count
parameters.description: Number of items to remove.

description: Modifies the player's reputation with a faction.

parameters.name: Faction
parameters.description: The faction whose reputation to modify.

parameters.name: Axis
parameters.description: Whether this is a positive or negative action.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.description: How large the reputation change is.

description: Awards disposition points along a character axis.

parameters.name: Axis
parameters.description: Which disposition axis to affect.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.description: How large the disposition change is.

description: Adds a companion or NPC to the active party.

parameters.name: Object GUID
parameters.description: GUID of the character to add to the party.

description: Removes a companion or NPC from the active party.

parameters.name: Object GUID
parameters.description: GUID of the character to remove from the party.

description: Marks a dialogue node as already seen, affecting HasConversationNodeBeenPlayed checks.

parameters.name: Conversation
parameters.description: Internal name of the conversation file.

parameters.name: Node ID
parameters.description: Integer ID of the node to mark as read.

description: Activates or deactivates a scene object.

parameters.name: Object GUID
parameters.description: GUID of the object to activate/deactivate.

parameters.name: Active
parameters.description: Whether to activate (true) or deactivate (false) the object.

description: Opens a door, chest, or container.

parameters.name: Object GUID
parameters.description: GUID of the object to open.

parameters.name: Ignore Lock
parameters.description: Whether to ignore any lock on the object.

description: Closes a door, chest, or container.

parameters.name: Object GUID
parameters.description: GUID of the object to close.

description: Locks a door, chest, or container.

parameters.name: Object GUID
parameters.description: GUID of the object to lock.

description: Fades the screen to black over the given duration.

parameters.name: Fade Time
parameters.description: Duration of the fade in seconds.

parameters.name: Fade Music
parameters.description: Whether to also fade out music.

parameters.name: Fade Ambient
parameters.description: Whether to also fade out ambient audio.

description: Fades the screen back in from black over the given duration.

parameters.name: Fade Time
parameters.description: Duration of the fade in seconds.

parameters.name: Fade Music
parameters.description: Whether to also fade in music.

parameters.name: Fade Ambient
parameters.description: Whether to also fade in ambient audio.
